name: Merge Triplets to Form Target Triplet
description: A triplet is an array of three integers. You are given a 2D integer array triplets, where triplets[i] = [ai, bi, ci]. You are also given an integer array target = [x, y, z]. To form the target, you can select some triplets and update the target by taking the element-wise maximum. Return true if it is possible to obtain the target as the element-wise maximum of some subset of triplets.

examples.output: true (pick triplets 0 and 2: max(2,1)=2, max(5,7)=7, max(3,5)=5)

constraints: 1 <= triplets.length <= 10^5. triplets[i].length == target.length == 3. 1 <= ai, bi, ci, x, y, z <= 1000.
python_template:

performance.stress_intent: exercise large triplet sets that punish brute-force subset checking
